title: God Has Pity On Kindergarten Children
content:

He pities school children less.
But adults he pities not at all.

title: The School Where I Studied
content:

title: Seven Laments For The War-Dead
content:
1
Mr. Beringer, whose son

so ships could cross the desert,

title: A Pity, We Were Such A Good Invention
content:
They amputated
Your thighs off my hips.
As far as I'm concerned
They are all surgeons.    All of them.

They dismantled us
Each from the other.

title: I Have Become Very Hairy
content:

content:

title: Once A Great Love
content:

content:

title: Yad Mordechai
content:

title: The First Rain
content:
The first rain reminds me
Of the rising summer dust.
The rain doesn't remember the rain of yesteryear.
A year is a trained beast with no memories.

title: Do Not Accept
content:

Better to linger. Make your pain
An image of the desert. Say it's said

content:

title: Ein Yahav
content:

title: Jerusalem

content:

Then let my right be forgotten.

title: I Know A Man
content:
I know a man
who photographed the view he saw
from the window of the room where he made love
and not the face of the woman he loved there.

title: My Child Wafts Peace
content:
